# CrownMe Media

> CrownMe is the 18+ social photo competition. Members post photos, get voted by other members, and climb city, country, and global leaderboards. No gambling, no real-money prizes.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Sign up or log in to CrownMe.
- [Sign up — Age gate](/age-gate): 18+ age verification before signup.
- [Log in](/auth): Existing member login.

## Legal

- [Legal Center](/legal): Index of all CrownMe legal documents.
- [Terms of Service](/terms): User agreement and service terms.
- [Privacy Policy](/privacy): How CrownMe handles personal data.
- [Community Guidelines](/conduct): Conduct rules for members.
- [Cookie Policy](/cookies): Cookies and tracking technologies.
- [DMCA & Copyright Policy](/dmca): Copyright takedown procedure.
- [Acceptable Use Policy](/acceptable-use): What is and isn't allowed.
- [EULA](/eula): End-user license agreement.
- [Subscription Terms](/subscription-terms): Royal Pass and subscription billing.
- [Virtual Goods Policy](/virtual-goods): Shekels, gifts, and in-app currency.
- [Child Safety Policy](/csae-policy): CSAE prevention and reporting.
- [Legal Contact](/contact-legal): How to reach legal, DPO, and DMCA agent.
